name: Engram Memory + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon
blurb: Multi-order N-gram memory (Engram) replacing BigramHash: bigram+trigram hash tables with multi-head hashing and context-aware gating, inspired by DeepSeek Engram. Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU², Legal TTT, Parallel Muon, XSA, Partial RoPE, EMA+SWA, GPTQ-lite int6). Pending H100 validation.
author: korbindeman
